notes: Cross-session memory for AV Intelligence Digest Agent v8.5

Waymo.last_item_headline: Waymo reference model for human collision avoidance published in Nature Communications (TU Delft collaboration)

Apollo Go.last_item_headline: Apollo Go Elderly Week Wuhan free rides seniors 60+ June 7-11 Hongshan District Social Welfare Institute

WeRide.last_item_headline: Slovak Prime Minister Meets WeRide, Signals Support for Multi-Product Autonomous Vehicle Deployment in Bratislava

Pony.ai.last_item_headline: Pony AI CFO Dr. Haojun Wang appointed joint company secretary; HKEX Rule 3.28 waiver obtained

ongoing_stories.headline: China nationwide AV permit freeze
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active Day 44 as of 2026-06-11. No resumption timeline. Three stress tests mandated not completed. MIIT/MOT sources offline.

ongoing_stories.headline: Apollo Go outage trigger date RESOLVED 2026-06-08
Waymo NHTSA recall 3791 vehicles flooding defect
ongoing_stories.last_status: Open Day 30 as of 2026-06-11. Permanent remedy in development. San Antonio and Atlanta paused. No new update June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo freeway ride suspension construction zone edge cases
ongoing_stories.last_status: Ongoing Day 21 as of 2026-06-11. All freeway rides suspended SF LA PHX MIA. Surface streets operational. No new update June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: Apollo Go Wuhan service shutdown ongoing post-outage
ongoing_stories.last_status: Commercial operations still suspended as of 2026-06-11. Elderly Week social welfare rides June 7-11 Wuhan Hongshan District concluded. No official Baidu/MIIT resumption statement. conflict_age_days 15. ESCALATED HIGH PRIORITY.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: Version A fully shut down: Automotive World/CNBC Score 4. Version B limited social welfare activity: apollogo.com Tier 1 June 7-11 Elderly Week Wuhan Hongshan District Score 5. Working conclusion: commercial operations still suspended; Elderly Week was not commercial resumption. HIGH PRIORITY. conflict_age_days 15. ESCALATED.
status_change_triggers: Tier 1-3 source confirming full commercial operations

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo Ojai US Senate scrutiny of Zeekr/Geely manufacturing partnership
ongoing_stories.last_status: Active as of 2026-06-11 Day 15 unchanged. Senator Bernie Moreno (Ohio-R) accused Waymo of bypassing connected vehicles ban. Waymo CSO rebuttal: Zeekr vehicles have no connectivity. No Senate hearing scheduled. conflict_age_days 15. HIGH PRIORITY. ESCALATED.
ongoing_stories.conflicting_data: Senator Moreno accusation vs Waymo CSO rebuttal. No confirmed Senate hearing date. conflict_age_days 15. HIGH PRIORITY. ESCALATED.

ongoing_stories.headline: 17-18 EU transport ministers sign cross-border AV testing declaration
ongoing_stories.last_status: Signed June 8. 17 named signatories plus possible 18th. EUR 20M CEF funding. No implementation timeline. No status change June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo vs Wayve/Uber London robotaxi competition intensifies
ongoing_stories.last_status: Uber Wayve public waiting list opened June 8. $300M contingent Uber investment in Wayve. Waymo testing 100 vehicles 100 sq miles London since April 2026. UK regulatory framework pending. No status change June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo vehicle obstructs emergency response Dallas apartment explosion
ongoing_stories.last_status: Incident June 4 2026. No regulatory investigation announced. Under media scrutiny. No change June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: Waymo acquires Apple 5500-acre AV proving ground Wittmann Arizona $220M
ongoing_stories.last_status: Sale recorded June 5 2026. 5500 acres; 115-acre city course, dynamics area, 4-mile oval, freeway course. Waymo uses for rider-only testing, motion control, operational training. No new update June 11.
status_change_triggers: Facility operational for Waymo testing announced

ongoing_stories.headline: Bolt, Pony.ai and Stellantis launch Luxembourg Level 4 autonomous mobility testing program
ongoing_stories.last_status: Announced June 9 2026. 5 Gen-7 vehicles. Testing starts Bissen, expanding to Luxembourg City over 12 months. Targets fully driverless readiness by program end. No update June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: Slovak PM Fico meets WeRide, signals support for multi-product L4 AV deployment
ongoing_stories.last_status: Meeting June 10 2026 Bratislava. First vehicle batch arrived June 2026. Testing Bratislava then Kosice and High Tatras. Commercial operations 2026 target. No update June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: WeRide, Uber and AVOMO announce Spain's first commercial robotaxi pilot in Madrid
ongoing_stories.last_status: Announced June 2 2026. Service via Uber app. Initial phase with trained vehicle operators expanding to fully driverless. AVOMO (Moove Cars Group) fleet partner. Fourth of 15 cities under WeRide-Uber global partnership by 2030. WeRide fifth European market. Added to registry June 11.

ongoing_stories.headline: NHTSA trims crash reporting requirements, widens AV testing access (effective June 16, 2026)
ongoing_stories.last_status: New rules take effect June 16 2026. Trimmed crash reporting requirements; widened testing access for robotaxis. 18 US states allow fully driverless operations with commercial permits. SELF DRIVE Act (House bill) remains a draft. Source: Scientific American.
status_change_triggers: SELF DRIVE Act advanced to vote
New state approvals issued under new rules

ongoing_stories.headline: WeRide Annual General Meeting scheduled June 26, 2026 Guangzhou
ongoing_stories.last_status: AGM set for June 26 2026 at 10:00 AM Beijing time in Guangzhou. Annual report 2025 filed. Announced May 8 2026.
